languages.text: "Похоже, ты не удивлен{mf||а} этому откровению. Хорошо: значит, в твоей душе уже живет готовность принять судьбу служения Истине. Теодора была упрямее: она мнила себя истинной владычицей собственной судьбы. Напрасно".

traits.locale_text: "Похоже, ты не удивлен{mf||а} этому откровению. Хорошо: значит, в твоей душе уже живет готовность принять судьбу служения Истине. Теодора была упрямее: она мнила себя истинной владыцичей собственной судьбы. Напрасно".

"Похоже, ты не удивлен{mf||а} этому откровению. Хорошо: значит, в твоей душе уже живет готовность принять судьбу служения Истине. Теодора была упрямее: она мнила себя истинной владычицей собственной судьбы. Напрасно".

languages.text: "It does not look like you are surprised by this revelation. Good. That means there is willingness in your soul to accept your fate and serve the Primordial Truth already. Theodora was more stubborn — she fancied herself mistress of her own destiny. She was not."
languages.original_text: "Похоже, ты не удивлен{mf||а} этому откровению. Хорошо: значит, в твоей душе уже живет готовность принять судьбу служения Истине. Теодора была упрямее: она мнила себя истинной владычицей собственной судьбы. Напрасно".

traits.locale_text: "It does not look like you are surprised by this revelation. Very well, it means there is willingness in your soul to accept your fate and serve the Primordial Truth already. Theodora was more stubborn, she fancied herself a mistress of her own destiny. Which she was not."

"It does not look like you are surprised by this revelation. Very well, it means there is willingness in your soul to accept your fate and serve the Primordial Truth already. Theodora was more stubborn, she fancied herself a mistress of her own destiny. Which she was not."

"It does not look like you are surprised by this revelation. Good. That means there is willingness in your soul to accept your fate and serve the Primordial Truth already. Theodora was more stubborn — she fancied herself mistress of her own destiny. She was not."

"It does not look like you are surprised by this revelation. Good. That means there is willingness in your soul to accept your fate and serve the Primordial Truth already. Theodora was more stubborn — she fancied herself mistress of her own destiny. She was not."

"It does not look like you are surprised by this revelation. Good. That means there is willingness in your soul to accept your fate and serve the Primordial Truth already. Theodora was more stubborn — she fancied herself mistress of her own destiny. She was not."

languages.text: "Es sieht nicht so aus, als ob Sie von dieser Enthüllung überrascht wären. Das ist gut. Das bedeutet, dass in deiner Seele die Bereitschaft vorhanden ist, dein Schicksal zu akzeptieren und der Urwahrheit bereits zu dienen. Theodora war starrköpfiger — sie bildete sich ein, Herrin ihres eigenen Schicksals zu sein. Das war sie nicht."
languages.original_text: "It does not look like you are surprised by this revelation. Good. That means there is willingness in your soul to accept your fate and serve the Primordial Truth already. Theodora was more stubborn — she fancied herself mistress of her own destiny. She was not."

traits.locale_text: "Es sieht nicht so aus, als ob Sie von dieser Enthüllung überrascht wären. Das ist gut. Das bedeutet, dass in deiner Seele die Bereitschaft vorhanden ist, dein Schicksal zu akzeptieren und der Urwahrheit bereits zu dienen. Theodora war starrköpfiger — sie bildete sich ein, Herrin ihres eigenen Schicksals zu sein. Das war sie nicht."

languages.text: "Vous n'avez pas l'air d'être surpris par cette révélation. C'est une bonne chose. Cela signifie que ton âme est prête à accepter ton destin et à servir la Vérité Primordiale. Théodora était plus têtue — elle se croyait maîtresse de son destin. Elle ne l'était pas."
languages.original_text: "It does not look like you are surprised by this revelation. Good. That means there is willingness in your soul to accept your fate and serve the Primordial Truth already. Theodora was more stubborn — she fancied herself mistress of her own destiny. She was not."

traits.locale_text: "Vous n'avez pas l'air d'être surpris par cette révélation. C'est une bonne chose. Cela signifie que ton âme est prête à accepter ton destin et à servir la Vérité Primordiale. Théodora était plus têtue — elle se croyait maîtresse de son destin. Elle ne l'était pas."

languages.text: "No parece que te sorprenda esta revelación. Eso es bueno. Eso significa que en tu alma ya hay voluntad de aceptar tu destino y servir a la Verdad Primordial". Theodora era más terca, se creía dueña de su propio destino. No lo era".
languages.original_text: "It does not look like you are surprised by this revelation. Good. That means there is willingness in your soul to accept your fate and serve the Primordial Truth already. Theodora was more stubborn — she fancied herself mistress of her own destiny. She was not."

traits.locale_text: "No parece que te sorprenda esta revelación. Eso es bueno. Eso significa que en tu alma ya hay voluntad de aceptar tu destino y servir a la Verdad Primordial". Theodora era más terca, se creía dueña de su propio destino. No lo era".

languages.text: "Bu ifşaat sizi şaşırtmış gibi görünmüyor. Güzel. Bu da demek oluyor ki ruhunuzda kaderinizi kabul etme ve Ezeli Gerçeğe hizmet etme isteği var. Theodora daha inatçıydı — kendini kendi kaderinin efendisi sanıyordu. Ama değildi."
languages.original_text: "It does not look like you are surprised by this revelation. Good. That means there is willingness in your soul to accept your fate and serve the Primordial Truth already. Theodora was more stubborn — she fancied herself mistress of her own destiny. She was not."

traits.locale_text: "Bu ifşaat sizi şaşırtmış gibi görünmüyor. Güzel. Bu da demek oluyor ki ruhunuzda kaderinizi kabul etme ve Ezeli Gerçeğe hizmet etme isteği var. Theodora daha inatçıydı — kendini kendi kaderinin efendisi sanıyordu. Ama değildi."
